funded_ads.posting_instructions:
## How to Post These ATEAM Ads to Facebook

**Campaign Budget:** US$28.49/day for 7 days
**Total Spend:** US$199.4

### Step 1: Create Campaign in Facebook Ads Manager
- Go to https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager
- Click '+ Create' → Choose 'Conversions' objective
- Set daily budget: US$28.49
- Campaign name: 'ATEAM Self-Marketing — [Date]'

### Step 2: Set Audience
- Location: Singapore, Hong Kong, Australia, Malaysia
- Age: 25-55
- Interests: Artificial intelligence, Business automation, SaaS, Startup, Digital transformation, No-code development
- Job titles: Founder, CEO, Business Owner, Director, CTO
- Languages: English

### Step 3: Upload Creatives

**Image Ad 1: $30,000/Month Team. Replaced by AI. $0/Month.**
- Headline: $30,000/Month Team. Replaced by AI. $0/Month.
- Primary text: Grant writer: replaced. Marketing manager: replaced. Ads specialist: replaced. CRM manager: replaced. Hermes does it all. See what AI can replace in your business.
- CTA button: Replace Your Team With AI
- Image brief: Split comparison: Left side shows 5 human employee photos with salary figures ($5K-$8K each, total $30K). Right side shows one sleek AI interface with...

**Image Ad 2: GovFund Was Built by AI. 7 Countries. 120+ Grant Schemes. Zero Human Staff.**
- Headline: GovFund Was Built by AI. 7 Countries. 120+ Grant Schemes. Zero Human Staff.
- Primary text: Hermes Agent built an entire government funding consultancy. From scratch. It finds grants, writes applications, runs marketing, manages CRM. What could it build for you?
- CTA button: Try Hermes Agent
- Image brief: World map with 7 country flags highlighted (SG, HK, AU, MY, PH, VN, TH). Connected by glowing lines to a central AI core. Subtle grant data visualizat...

**Image Ad 3: This AI Team Costs Less Than One Intern**
- Headline: This AI Team Costs Less Than One Intern
- Primary text: 9 autonomous AI agents. Grant writing. Marketing. Ads. CRM. All running 24/7. Hermes orchestrates everything. What team do you need?
- CTA button: Try Hermes Agent
- Image brief: Futuristic dark command center dashboard with 9 agent avatars displayed on screens. Each avatar labeled: Marketing, Ads, CRM, Grants, Research, Conten...

**Video Ad: The 7-Country AI**
- Duration: 15s
- Use the video script to produce or generate the video

### Step 4: Set Landing Page
- URL: https://scalesmes.com (or current ATEAM landing page)

### Step 5: Publish & Monitor
- Check after 24 hours for CTR > 1%
- Kill ads with CTR < 0.5% after 48 hours
- Scale winners by 20% every 3 days
